HediffDef.label: heroic destiny
HediffDef.description: This pawn bears a class and a heroic destiny. Their experience, level, and class powers flow from this bond. Death itself hesitates: when mortally wounded, a hero fights for their life rather than dying outright.

HediffDef.label: at death's door
HediffDef.description: This hero should be dead - only destiny holds the line. Each hour they make a death saving throw. Three successes and they stabilize; three failures and even destiny lets go. Tended wounds improve the odds, and taking damage in this state counts as a failure.

HediffDef.label: stabilized by destiny
HediffDef.description: This hero clawed their way back from death's door. They are out of immediate danger, though their wounds remain.
